TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_P_J_Brown, title = P_J_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/P_J_Brown} }

S.FORM: P. J. Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 10, P. J. Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

P. J. Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 10, P. J. Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: p. *. βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, p. *. βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
